title: . Liability. The System shall have the authority to choose or order a change of physician, hospital
content:
. Liability. The System shall have the authority to choose or order a change of physician, hospital or 
rehabilitation facility for the employee, and shall not be liable for compensation for any aggravation of the 
34 
Downloaded from the Department of Labor and Employment, Republic of the Philippines - 29 September 2011  
http://www.dole.gov.ph/labor_codes.php?id=34 
 
 
employee’s injury or sickness resulting from unauthorized changes by the employee of medical services, 
appliances, supplies, hospitals, rehabilitation facilities or physicians.
